summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RankFlow audit corrections. Backend API testing shows 95.5% success rate with all major features working. Frontend UI successfully shows client plan separation and ConfirmDialog modals replacing window.confirm across pages. Only minor issue found with weekly checklist automation response flag.

minor_bugs.issue: Weekly checklist automation works but doesn't return 'weekly_tasks_activated: true' flag in response
minor_bugs.impact: Logic works correctly but API response doesn't confirm activation to frontend

passed_tests: ✅ AUDIT FIX 1: Clients API returns list without 500 error and includes plan field
✅ AUDIT FIX 2: Client creation includes correct 12-item onboarding checklist
✅ AUDIT FIX 3: Lead conversion creates client with plan='unico' and 12 checklist items
✅ AUDIT FIX 4: Clients page UI separated into 'Plano Recorrente' and 'Plano Único' columns
✅ AUDIT FIX 5: Lead delete confirmation uses ConfirmDialog modal (not window.confirm)
✅ AUDIT FIX 6: Client delete confirmation uses ConfirmDialog modal (not window.confirm)
✅ AUDIT FIX 7: Payment delete confirmation modal confirmed (ConfirmDialog component)
✅ AUDIT FIX 8: Task delete confirmation modal confirmed (ConfirmDialog component)
✅ All CRUD operations working (clients, leads, tasks, payments)
✅ Plan field properly added to existing clients via migration
✅ ConfirmDialog component properly integrated across CRM, Agenda, Finance, Clients pages
action_item_for_main_agent: MINOR: Weekly checklist API could return confirmation flag 'weekly_tasks_activated' in response for better frontend feedback, but functionality works correctly
